catalogs.title: Sovereign Cloud Boundary
catalogs.description: Commercial · GCC · GCC High reference. Models the .com vs .us sovereignty split and the non-native ADF → GCC High hop.

catalogs.title: Zero-Trust Network Access
catalogs.description: Identity-centric perimeter with ZTNA proxy, Conditional Access, phish-resistant MFA, and PAM vault. No implicit trust by network position. SPOFs overlay tells the story.

catalogs.title: Cloud-Native SaaS Platform
catalogs.description: Multi-tenant SaaS reference — CDN, API gateway fan-out, async workers, Postgres primary/replica with 1-min RPO streaming repl, geo failover.

catalogs.title: OT/IT Industrial Convergence
catalogs.description: Manufacturing / critical infrastructure. Hardware data diode enforces one-way OT→IT flow. PLC → edge → DMZ → historian → analytics. SPOFs overlay lights up the data diode.

catalogs.title: Sovereign Sample (validation demo)
catalogs.description: Phase A rules demo: unmet requirement, boundary violation, blast radius. Deliberately trips the validator.

catalogs.title: Zero-Trust + Governance Overlay
catalogs.description: The zero-trust reference annotated by plumbline_to_anatomy — per-node gov status, failing dev environment stained red, GOV compliance ring. Toggle the Governance overlay.
